fix: purge OpenClaw backup configs fleet-wide to prevent telegram token conflicts

VMs to fight over getUpdates (killed Mucus's bot). Four fixes:
- configureOpenClaw: delete .bak* after writing new config
- health-check dupe fix: purge backups on loser VMs
- health-check: scan ready-pool VMs for stale tokens (5/cycle)
- cleanup script: fleet-wide scan ran and cleaned 40 VMs

commit.message:
Don't throw on removeFromParentNode() when parent is missing

Slide-to-delete on sessions calls node.delete() which calls
removeFromParentNode(). If the parent is already gone (e.g., during
cleanup), the throw crashes the UI. Now warns and skips instead.

commit.message:
fix: sanitize accented chars in Supabase Storage paths

Root cause: Supabase Storage rejects paths with accented characters
(e.g., "Correção") with 400 InvalidKey. All uploads were silently
failing, leaving the storage bucket empty. After Render restart,
files were permanently lost.

- Add _sanitize_path() to strip accents via NFKD normalization
- Apply sanitization to all storage operations (upload/download/etc)
- Fix _ler_conteudo_documento() to use resolver (downloads from Storage)
- Log storage upload failures instead of silent warning

fix: EF Core change tracking for JSON Roles column — ValueComparer added

field access mode so EF reads/writes _roles directly.

commit.message:
Improve analyst lens workflow: reorder layout, enrich AI prompts

1. Reorder analyst lens pages so sub-dimensions come before overall
   observations — analysts build evidence first, then synthesize.

2. Copilot now fetches fresh sub-dimension scores and observations
   from Supabase and includes them in the system prompt, so generated
   overall observations actually reference the analyst's own work.

3. Recommendations generation builds a structured prompt with clearly
   separated AUTOMATED ANALYSIS and ANALYST ASSESSMENT sections,
   always fetching fresh data from Supabase. JSON parse failures now
   log the full Claude response and return a clear error.

commit.message:
Session 162: GHA pipeline hardening — 8 fixes for zero-failure nightly runs

Fix 1: coreScraper pool max 3→2 + 5-retry exponential backoff for session-mode pool exhaustion
Fix 2: SportsAffinity agecode parser handles all 4 formats (B12, BU7, 7B, B11N)
Fix 3: RI Super Liga early-exit after 2 empty age groups (prevents 80min timeout on inactive season)
Fix 4: Timeout extensions with 15% buffer (SA 127m, PM 150m, GS-standings 253m, FPS 29m)
Fix 5: Split standings-heavy into 2 parallel jobs (SINC/PM/MLS + TGS/ECNL)
Fix 6: Updated all needs/if/summary refs for new scrape-standings-tgs job
Fix 7: Dashboard git pull --rebase before push (prevents non-fast-forward rejection)
Fix 8: UPI runs even when validation-pipeline fails (added failure condition)

commit.message:
FTC/FIF decoder improvements: bitstream parsing, scale tables, multi-channel decode

- ftcdecode: Rewrote block decoder with LSB-first bitstream, VLC count reader,
  per-channel decode (green/blue/red), affine transform with 8 symmetry modes,
  scale table generation (word0=6 case), and pixel transform lookup table
- ftcdecode: Fixed dim_x/dim_y computation (ceil(width/mult)), offset decode
  dimension, and block assignment RLE parsing
- fifdecode: Updated DLL bridge with corrected __cdecl calling convention,
  output-parameter OpenDecompressor, and DEP-disabled build flags
- Added ftcprobe utility for bitstream analysis

Still WIP: pixel transform formula, address table scan order, and multi-level
decode architecture need further work based on DLL analysis.

commit.message:
Fix projects page: switch to next-mdx-remote/rsc for static prerendering

The serialize + client MDXRemote pattern from next-mdx-remote v6 fails
during static prerendering (generateStaticParams) with:
  TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'useState')

Switch to MDXRemote from next-mdx-remote/rsc which renders server-side
and accepts raw MDX strings directly, no serialize() needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: CRM аналитика — убран невалидный highlight_prefixes + изоляция ошибок

highlight_prefixes — TypeError ломал обработку Individual стадий и
блокировал обновление Template (прочерки вместо данных).

Также добавлен try/except внутри цикла CRM подвкладок — ошибка в одной
не блокирует обновление другой.

Implement app-managed billing system to replace Stripe subscriptions

Replace Stripe subscription management with app-controlled billing system where database is source of truth. Stripe now only handles payment method storage and charge processing.

Key changes:
- Add billing.ts library with charge processing, retry logic, and notifications
- Create monthly-billing cron (8 PM CST / 2 AM UTC) to charge accounts based on next_billing_date
- Create retry-failed-payments cron to retry on days 3, 5, 7, 10
- Update subscription APIs (create, cancel, pause, resume, update-plan) to manage billing in-app
- Add charge_immediately option to CreateSubscriptionModal with payment method validation
- Add billing tracking columns: last_billing_attempt, billing_retry_count, last_payment_failed_at
- Configure cron jobs in vercel.json with proper timeouts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Redesign widget: single screen, no FAB, build script for baked config

- Single-screen form: first name, last name, phone, visited before, submit
- Remove floating button — widget exposes openBookingWidget() for the
  salon to call from their own buttons (nav bar, hero, etc.)
- Remove email field and multi-step flow
- Add make_widget.js build script that generates a self-contained .js file
  with hardcoded tenant config (no runtime config fetch needed)
- Generated widget includes cache-control recommendations in header comment
- Version via filename (widget-bay-salon-v1.js → v2.js to bust cache)

Usage:
  node make_widget.js \
    --tenant_id=bay-salon-and-boutique \
    --tenant_display_name="Bay Salon & Boutique" \
    --output_file=widget-bay-salon-v1.js \
    --data_api_handler="https://booking.4mainstreet.com/api/handle_booking"

Salon embeds:
  <script src="https://booking.4mainstreet.com/widget-bay-salon-v1.js"></script>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix attendance page crash by including records in API response

The attendance sessions API only returned _count but not the actual
records array. The frontend tried to filter session.records to count
present members, causing a client-side exception.

commit.message:
feat(harness): modularize provider architecture and refine TUI bundle navigation (#89)

* feat(harness): modularize provider architecture and refine TUI bundle navigation

Extract monolithic executor implementations into per-provider packages
under internal/harness/providers/{claude,codex,copilot,cursor,gemini,opencode},
replacing the flat YAML-based provider definitions and large executor files.

Key changes:
- Replace executor.go and individual executor files with provider-specific packages
- Introduce harnesstype package for shared type definitions
- Add builtins.go for built-in harness registration
- Refactor MCP config to simplified provider-driven approach
- Overhaul TUI bundle navigation with improved state management
- Enhance doctor checks with richer diagnostics
- Add help snapshot and docgen tests for CLI output stability
- Move community files (CODE_OF_CONDUCT, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY) to .github/
- Update README, docs, and CHANGELOG

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review feedback for safety and backward compatibility

- Use os.CreateTemp for doctor probe to avoid clobbering existing files
- Add nil/empty/duplicate guards to registerProviderSpec for fail-fast
- Backfill legacy installed.json entries missing namespace/ref fields
  instead of hard-failing (preserves backward compatibility)
- Set LastCheckedAt to time.Now() after update check refresh to avoid
  re-checking on every TUI start

commit.message:
Fix VLM generate: use processor.prepare() for VLM input

VLM models crash with "SmallVector out of range" when given raw
LMInput(tokens:). VLM requires UserInput -> processor.prepare() -> LMInput
to properly set up model-specific input format.

Added syncPerformAsync for async processor.prepare() calls within
the semaphore-based synchronous bridge.
